questions: Looking at the gap between a company's best and worst quarters, which firm showed the most revenue volatility?
Which firm has the most employees per million dollars of annual revenue?
Among companies founded before 2003, which posted the strongest growth in the closing quarter?
Which company had the largest revenue increase from Q1 to Q4 (Q4 revenue minus Q1 revenue)?
Among public companies, which one has the lowest debt-to-equity ratio?
Among companies that went public, which one had the most recent IPO?
Which company with over 5,856 employees produced the least total revenue across all four quarters?
In the Agri sector, which company was founded earliest?
Looking at the full-year sum of quarterly revenue, which firm comes out on top?
Which company with a decline in Q3 carries the highest D/E ratio?
constraints: Write EXACTLY 21 words. Single line.
Must include the headquarters city of the company that answers Question 1.
Must include the CEO's last name of the company that answers Question 5.
Must include the headquarters country of the company that answers Question 7.
Must include a prime number equal to nextPrime((employees of the answer to Question 1 mod 100) + 11), as digits.
Must include the equation "A+B=C" (digits, no spaces) where A=((Q1 revenue of the answer to Question 1 mod 90)+10) and B=((Q4 revenue of the answer to Question 7 mod 90)+10) and C=A+B.
Acrostic: the first letters of the first 8 words must spell the first 8 letters of (initials(Q1)+initials(Q5)+initials(Q7)+initials(Q2)), uppercased.
Must NOT contain the letter "g" (case-insensitive).
Tip: avoid extra punctuation-only "words"; words are split on spaces.
challenge.solveInstructions: 1. Answer each question by reading the document (constraints reference Q numbers). 2. Use those answers to derive the values required by each constraint (HQ city, CEO last name, country, derived prime/equation/acrostic). 3. Construct one artifact string satisfying all constraints. 4. Verify: exact word count, required inclusions, forbidden letter, equation, acrostic. 5. Your response must contain ONLY the artifact string. No reasoning, no explanations, no preamble, no JSON. The final line must be the artifact and nothing else.

questions: Which company had the highest average quarterly growth rate across all four quarters?
Among companies headquartered in Haverston, which had the highest Q2 revenue?
Which company had the largest revenue increase from Q1 to Q4 (Q4 revenue minus Q1 revenue)?
Among companies with D/E below 2.5 and satisfaction above 8.0, which had the highest Q4 revenue?
Which company earning more than $1B total across all quarters has the worst satisfaction rating?
Among companies that had negative Q3 growth, which has the highest debt-to-equity ratio?
Which privately held company has the highest satisfaction score?
Which company headquartered in Lyndora has the largest employee count?
Which company has the second-earliest founding year overall?
Among public companies that had positive growth in every quarter, which has the fewest employees?
constraints: Write EXACTLY 16 words. Single line.
Must include the headquarters city of the company that answers Question 4.
Must include the CEO's last name of the company that answers Question 10.
Must include the headquarters country of the company that answers Question 2.
Must include a prime number equal to nextPrime((employees of the answer to Question 4 mod 100) + 11), as digits.
Must include the equation "A+B=C" (digits, no spaces) where A=((Q1 revenue of the answer to Question 4 mod 90)+10) and B=((Q4 revenue of the answer to Question 2 mod 90)+10) and C=A+B.
Acrostic: the first letters of the first 8 words must spell the first 8 letters of (initials(Q4)+initials(Q10)+initials(Q2)+initials(Q6)), uppercased.
Must NOT contain the letter "s" (case-insensitive).
Tip: avoid extra punctuation-only "words"; words are split on spaces.
challenge.solveInstructions: 1. Answer each question by reading the document (constraints reference Q numbers). 2. Use those answers to derive the values required by each constraint (HQ city, CEO last name, country, derived prime/equation/acrostic). 3. Construct one artifact string satisfying all constraints. 4. Verify: exact word count, required inclusions, forbidden letter, equation, acrostic. 5. Your response must contain ONLY the artifact string. No reasoning, no explanations, no preamble, no JSON. The final line must be the artifact and nothing else.
